_publications._publicationTitle: Induction of apoptosis in neurofibromatosis type 1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by a combination of novel farnesyl transferase inhibitors and lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: However, a reduction of Ras prenylation was observed in the NF90-8 cells following combination treatment of 1 μM 1 or 2 with 1 μM lovastatin
details: Reduction of Ras prenylation observed following combination treatment of 1 μM FTI compounds with 1 μM lovastatin, with near complete inhibition achieved
